channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: James Webb Telescope Finds Rare Giant Planet with Earth-Like Temperatures
item.description: Astronomers using NASA's James Webb Space Telescope have discovered a rare giant planet with temperatures similar to Earth's, unlike anything in our solar system.

item.title: Scientists Discover Towering Red Auroras Reaching Deep into Space Above Japan
item.description: Mysterious red auroras spotted over Japan were found to reach extremely high altitudes, even during relatively mild space storms.

item.title: ‘Zombie cells’ aren’t always harmful, which could change anti-aging medicine
item.description: Scientists find aging cells can both damage and protect the body, opening new avenues for treatment.

item.title: Ancient asteroid craters may have triggered Earth’s oxygen-producing life
item.description: A hidden crater in South Korea offers clues to how oxygen levels rose, reshaping Earth’s history.
